decisions.title: Trace-pack classifies refresh health
decisions.description: The canonical refresh signal in trace-pack is now a health classification. Operators should see healthy or degraded plus diagnosis rather than inferring state from raw JetStream counters.
alternatives: Keep exposing only cadence and durable counters in SUMMARY.md
Add external alerting before defining an in-tool health classification

decisions.title: Classification remains anchored in existing signals
decisions.description: Refresh health is derived only from existing canonical signals: bootstrap.reconcile_interval and the consumer/emulator refresh durables in CONFIGCTL_EVENTS. Missing monitor state, missing durables, pending work, redeliveries, or cadence misalignment degrade the signal.
alternatives: Introduce new runtime endpoints for refresh health
Derive health from logs instead of config plus JetStream state
